mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_BOARD.CURRVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BOARD ( BOARD_ID, BOARD_TYPE, STOCK_ID, USER_ID, BOARD_TITLE, BOARD_CONTENT, VIEW_COUNT, CREATE_DATE, MODIFY_DATE, DELETE_DATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_BOARD.NEXTVAL, #{boardType}, #{stockId}, #{userId}, #{boardTitle}, #{boardContent}, 0, SYSDATE, NULL, NULL )
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD SET VIEW_COUNT = VIEW_COUNT + 1 WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId} AND DELETE_DATE IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT B.BOARD_ID AS boardId, B.BOARD_TITLE AS boardTitle, B.BOARD_CONTENT AS boardContent, B.CREATE_DATE AS createDate, B.MODIFY_DATE AS modifyDate, B.DELETE_DATE AS deleteDate, B.VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, B.STOCK_ID AS stockId, S.STOCK_NAME AS stockName, B.BOARD_TYPE AS boardType, B.USER_ID AS userId FROM BOARD B LEFT JOIN STOCKS S ON S.STOCK_ID = B.STOCK_ID WHERE B.BOARD_ID = #{boardId} AND B.DELETE_DATE IS NULL

SELECT B.BOARD_ID AS boardId, B.BOARD_TITLE AS boardTitle, B.BOARD_CONTENT AS boardContent, B.CREATE_DATE AS createDate, B.MODIFY_DATE AS modifyDate, B.DELETE_DATE AS deleteDate, B.VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, B.STOCK_ID AS stockId, S.STOCK_NAME AS stockName, B.BOARD_TYPE AS boardType, B.USER_ID AS userId FROM BOARD B LEFT JOIN STOCKS S ON S.STOCK_ID = B.STOCK_ID WHERE B.DELETE_DATE IS NULL
AND B.BOARD_TYPE = #{boardType}
AND B.STOCK_ID IS NULL
AND B.STOCK_ID IS NOT NULL
AND B.STOCK_ID = #{stockId}
AND B.BOARD_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND B.BOARD_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND B.USER_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND ( B.BOARD_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR B.BOARD_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR B.USER_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY B.CREATE_DATE DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT B.BOARD_ID AS boardId, B.BOARD_TITLE AS boardTitle, B.BOARD_CONTENT AS boardContent, B.CREATE_DATE AS createDate, B.MODIFY_DATE AS modifyDate, B.DELETE_DATE AS deleteDate, B.VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, B.STOCK_ID AS stockId, S.STOCK_NAME AS stockName, B.BOARD_TYPE AS boardType, B.USER_ID AS userId FROM BOARD B LEFT JOIN STOCKS S ON S.STOCK_ID = B.STOCK_ID WHERE B.DELETE_DATE IS NULL AND B.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY B.CREATE_DATE DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD SET BOARD_TYPE = #{boardType}, STOCK_ID = #{stockId}, BOARD_TITLE = #{boardTitle}, BOARD_CONTENT = #{boardContent}, MODIFY_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId} AND DELETE_DATE IS NULL
UPDATE BOARD SET DELETE_DATE = SYSDATE, MODIFY_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId} AND DELETE_DATE IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT B.BOARD_ID AS boardId, B.BOARD_TITLE AS boardTitle, B.BOARD_CONTENT AS boardContent, B.CREATE_DATE AS createDate, B.MODIFY_DATE AS modifyDate, B.DELETE_DATE AS deleteDate, B.VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, B.STOCK_ID AS stockId, S.STOCK_NAME AS stockName, B.BOARD_TYPE AS boardType, B.USER_ID AS userId FROM BOARD B LEFT JOIN STOCKS S ON S.STOCK_ID = B.STOCK_ID WHERE B.DELETE_DATE IS NULL AND B.CREATE_DATE >= #{fromDate} ORDER BY ( (B.VIEW_COUNT + ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPLY R WHERE R.BOARD_ID = B.BOARD_ID AND R.DELETE_DATE IS NULL ) * 3) / (((SYSDATE - B.CREATE_DATE) * 24) + 1) ) DESC FETCH FIRST #{limit} ROWS ONLY
